hero.title: Analyze Your GitHub PRs with AI
hero.subtitle: Get instant AI-powered insights on code quality, impact, and AI usage across your pull requests.
hero.inputHint: Paste a whole repository or a single pull request — we'll analyze either.
hero.trust: Free • No login required • Public repos only

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get AI-powered insights on your pull requests.

step1.title: Paste Your Repo URL
step1.description: Enter any public GitHub repository URL and we'll fetch the latest merged pull requests.

step2.title: AI Analyzes PRs
step2.description: Our AI engine scores each PR on impact, AI-leverage, and code quality using Claude.

step3.title: Get Your Report
step3.description: View detailed scores, charts, and actionable insights in an interactive dashboard.

scoring.title: What We Measure
scoring.subtitle: Every pull request is scored across three key dimensions to give you a complete picture.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Does the PR deliver real value? We measure meaningful changes versus trivial fixes and boilerplate.

aiLeverage.title: AI Leverage
aiLeverage.description: Is there evidence of AI-assisted development? Higher scores reward skillful use of AI tools.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Engineering excellence: focused scope, clean code, test coverage, and clear PR descriptions.

cta.title: Ready to Analyze Your PRs?
cta.subtitle: Paste any public GitHub repository URL and get AI-powered insights in seconds.

preview.title: See Your Dashboard in Action
preview.subtitle: A preview of the interactive report you'll get — scores, breakdowns, and PR-level insights at a glance.

loading.funFact1: The average PR has 50 lines changed
loading.funFact2: Top teams review PRs within 4 hours

dashboard.recommendationsSubtitle: AI-generated suggestions to improve your pull request practices.

footer.description: AI-powered GitHub pull request analysis tool.

analysisScope.title: What should we analyze?
analysisScope.subtitle: Pick the pull requests you want scored. Narrow filters keep the analysis fast.
analysisScope.typesHint: Optional. Select one or more conventional-commit prefixes to filter by. Empty = all types.

errors.INVALID_URL: Please enter a valid GitHub repository or pull request URL.
errors.REPO_NOT_FOUND: Repository not found. Please check the URL and try again.
errors.PR_NOT_FOUND: Pull request not found. Please check the URL and try again.
errors.ACCESS_DENIED: This repository is private. Only public repositories can be analyzed.
errors.GITHUB_RATE_LIMIT: GitHub rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.AI_RATE_LIMIT: AI rate limit reached. Please try again in a minute.
errors.AI_TOO_LARGE: Request too large for the AI model. Narrow your filters and try again.
errors.AI_ERROR: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
errors.AI_AUTH_ERROR: AI service authentication failed. Please check the API key.
errors.NO_MERGED_PRS: No pull requests match your filters in this repository.
errors.GITHUB_API_ERROR: Failed to fetch data from GitHub. Please try again.
errors.TIMEOUT: Analysis timed out. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.CLIPBOARD_ERROR: Couldn't copy to clipboard. Please copy the URL manually.
errors.EXPIRED_DESCRIPTION: Cached results are kept for one hour. Re-run the analysis to view this report again.
